ops.title: ccx vcs diff in jj-colocated repos: resolved in v0.6.1
ops.body: Doc 3a3fc50 described ccx diff as degenerate in jj-colocated repos (0 symbols / 0 hunks for working-copy sources, reported against ccx 0.2.0). This no longer reproduces on v0.6.1: internal/vcs resolves jj revsets to git commit ranges before the structural diff. Verified live 2026-07-07 in this repo (jj-colocated): 'ccx vcs show 95b22cd' and 'ccx vcs diff 95b22cd~1..95b22cd' both emit per-symbol structural output and hunks. Working-copy (uncommitted) sources are exercised by the 2026-07 fleet rollout's ccx vcs diff review steps.
ops.when: before re-investigating structural-symbol output of ccx vcs diff in jj-colocated repos
